title: Delivery Truck Driver
description: Drive light/medium delivery trucks in the Tokyo metropolitan area. Fixed routes. SSW Type 1 visa sponsorship available.

title: Warehouse Logistics Staff
description: Sorting, packing, and forklift operation in a large distribution center. Shift work required.

title: Food Processing Worker
description: Work in a clean-room environment preparing and packaging meat products. Subsidized company housing provided.

title: Industrial Machinery Operator
description: Operating CNC machines and pressing equipment for auto parts. Previous experience preferred.
